metadata.description: Name for the AI resource and used to derive name of dependent resources.
Friendly name for your Hub resource

defaultAiHubDescription.defaultValue: This is an example AI resource for use in Azure AI Studio.

metadata.description: Description of your Azure AI resource displayed in AI studio
Name for the AI project resources.
Friendly name for your Azure AI resource
Specifies the public network access for the Azure AI Hub workspace.
Specifies the public network access for the Azure AI Project workspace.Note: Please ensure that if you are setting this to Enabled, the AI Hub workspace is also set to Enabled.

defaultAiProjectDescription.defaultValue: This is an example AI Project resource for use in Azure AI Studio.

metadata.description: Description of your Azure AI resource displayed in AI studio
Resource group location
Location for all resources.
Set of tags to apply to all resources.
Name of the Azure AI Search account
Name for capabilityHost.
Name of the storage account
Name of the Azure AI Services account
Model name for deployment
Model format for deployment
Model version for deployment
Model deployment SKU name
Model deployment capacity
Model deployment location. If you want to deploy an Azure AI resource/model in different location than the rest of the resources created.
AI service kind, values can be "OpenAI" or "AIService"
The AI Service Account name. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created. The resource should exist in same resource group
The AI Search Service name. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.The resource should exist in same resource group must be Public Network Disabled
The name of the agents virtual network to create. As of 3/13/2025 the address space of the subnet has to be either 172 or 192.
The name of Agents Subnet. As of 3/13/2025 the address space of the subnet has to be either 172 or 192.
The name of Customer Hub subnet.
The name of PE Agents Subnet
The name of the existing hub virtual network - when deploying with agents subnet. It needs to use 172 or 192 address space.
The name of the existing virtual network resource group. Agents subnet should be in the same resource group as the hub.
The name of the existing agents virtual network. It needs to use 172 or 192 address space.
The name of the existing agents virtual network resource group. Agents subnet should be in the same resource group as the hub.
When true, the module will create private DNS zones and link them to the VNet. When false, it will not create any DNS zones.
The name of User Assigned Identity
Azure region for resource deployment
Name of the user-assigned managed identity
Flag indicating if the identity already exists
Resource group name for main vnet - where AI Foundry is deployed

hubVirtualNetworkId.value: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingHubVirtualNetworkName'))), extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('hubVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('existingHubVirtualNetworkName')), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('hubVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('hub-vnet-{0}', parameters('suffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.id.value)]

agentsVirtualNetworkId.value: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingAgentsVirtualNetworkName'))), extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('agentsVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('existingAgentsVirtualNetworkName')), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('agentsVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('agents-vnet-{0}', parameters('suffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.id.value)]

hubSubnetId.value: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingHubVirtualNetworkName'))), extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('hubVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('existingHubVirtualNetworkName'), variables('_hubSubnetName')), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('hubVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('hub-vnet-{0}', parameters('suffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.subnetIds.value[0])]

agentsSubnetId.value: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingAgentsVirtualNetworkName'))), extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('agentsVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('existingAgentsVirtualNetworkName'), variables('_agentsSubnetName')), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('agentsVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('agents-vnet-{0}', parameters('suffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.subnetIds.value[0])]

agentsPeSubnetId.value: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingAgentsVirtualNetworkName'))), extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('agentsVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('existingAgentsVirtualNetworkName'), variables('_agentsPeSubnetName')), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('agentsVnetRg')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('agents-vnet-{0}', parameters('suffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.subnetIds.value[1])]

PROJECT_CONNECTION_STRING.value: [if(equals(parameters('hubPublicNetworkAccess'), 'Enabled'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-{1}--project', parameters('name'), parameters('uniqueSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.projectConnectionString.value, format('{0};{1};{2};{3}', format('{0}.workspace.{1}', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-{1}--project', parameters('name'), parameters('uniqueSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.aiProjectWorkspaceId.value, split(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-{1}--project', parameters('name'), parameters('uniqueSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.projectConnectionString.value, ';')[0]), split(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-{1}--project', parameters('name'), parameters('uniqueSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.projectConnectionString.value, ';')[1], parameters('resourceGroupName'), split(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-{1}--project', parameters('name'), parameters('uniqueSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.projectConnectionString.value, ';')[3]))]
